name: Beaulah's Hermits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixture of lard and butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, molasses, and coffee until well combined.
3. Sift together the remaining ingredients (flour, coffee, spices, raisins) and add them to the mixture.
4. Beat the batter until well mixed. If necessary, add a little more flour, but be careful not to add too much, as this will make the cookies hard and dry.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a buttered cookie sheet.
6. Bake for about 10 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
Alternatively:
7. Spread the batter evenly in two 9x9-inch cake tins.
8. Bake for about 12 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
9. Once baked, sprinkle with additional brown sugar if desired.
10. Cut into bars and serve.
